channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Item left on corner of road, 2nd March
item.description:
This child's car left on corner of road. Obstructing the way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckingham Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish has been dumped behind the bridge wall again, this time on the non-church side. It is precariously perched on a small section of the wall and could potentially fall into the river. Please arrange for it to be cleared as soon as possible., 2nd March
item.description:
More rubbish has been dumped behind the bridge wall again, this time on the non-church side. It is precariously perched on a small section of the wall and could potentially fall into the river. Please arrange for it to be cleared as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - Stream Way, 2nd March
item.description:
Paving slabs and rubble sacks have been left at the junction of Riverdale Road and Brooke Street Erith
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on green space.. so sad to see again, 2nd March
item.description:
Please can someone clear a fly tip at topley street end of green chain walk 50 plus bags a settee further up green chain walk two scooters one that’s been burnt out along with more fly tipping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Will Crooks Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop line faded on A, B, C approaches, 2nd March
item.description:
Stop line faded on A, B, C approaches
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Solar Way, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Pothole, 2nd March
item.description:
Large pothole by kerb just before the traffic lights
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car, 2nd March
item.description:
This car has been abandoned outside 41-43 Belmont Lane for over a year. It has had no MOT for months and now no tax.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The builders rubble and furniture, 2nd March
item.description:
It's not on private land int's in the corner of the street where the 2 roads fork apart.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coll's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Void Land sandwiched between Leigh Terrace and Wateringbury Close is being used as a dumping ground for waste., 2nd March
item.description:
The waste is building up and is a perfect breeding ground for vermin. People are dumping waste and other items in the void area behind Leigh Terrace and Wateringbury Close. It is not only unsightly but unhealthy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Leigh Terrace, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pile of what looks like rubber tubing dumped in road, 2nd March
item.description:
Someone has flytipped a big pile of what looks like rubber tubing at the edge of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Valley Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin liners full of waste left on the floor, 2nd March
item.description:
Bin liners full of waste left on the floor, this is generally a weekly occurrence even though they have 500 bins to put their waste in, rubbish all over the road broken glass and food waste attracting rats, right next to a green space that children use

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Villas Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large pothole close to the mini roundabout junction of Townley Rd and Upton Rd, 2nd March
item.description:
This pothole has been there for several weeks,I am a cyclist and in my opinion someone could get seriously injured.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townley Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle Ramps / Park being built in woodland, 2nd March
item.description:
Cycle ramps / circuit being built in South Hill Woods, more added this weekend

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tootswood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on front of office, 2nd March
item.description:
A graffiti has appeared on the front of the office building 40 Borough High Street, London SE1 1XW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Borough High Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter issue, 2nd March
item.description:
There is regularly a lot of rubbish on the road / pavements at the Croydon end of Padua Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Padua Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking access to private parking, 2nd March
item.description:
I had to wait an hour for the lorry driver to move. His advise was to go around and access my car park by entering the street from the other side which clearly marked as not entry access point. Location: 1-6 Bateman's Row, London EC2A 3HH

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Batemans Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the gate posts entry to Warwick Gardens, 2nd March
item.description:
Been there about a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Lyndhurst Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 2nd March
item.description:
This car has been dumped outside 124 barnfield rd for 2 days with no registration plates

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Barnfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Block drain. road flood's due to a block drain outside number 6., 2nd March
item.description:
Block drain. road flood's due to a block drain outside number 6.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Warren Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 2nd March
item.description:
Dead fox near the graves at the back of church
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaufort Place, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
